Sections.Heading: Agreement to Terms
Sections.Content: By accessing and using the Atria Health website and services, you agree to be bound by these Terms and Conditions. If you do not agree with any part of these terms, you may not access the website or use our services.

Sections.Heading: Use of Services
Sections.Content: Atria Health provides information about our healthcare services, membership programs, research initiatives, and educational content. The information provided on this website is for general informational purposes only and should not be considered medical advice.

Sections.Heading: Medical Disclaimer
Sections.Content: The content on this website is not intended to be a substitute for professional medical advice, diagnosis, or treatment. Always seek the advice of your physician or other qualified health provider with any questions you may have regarding a medical condition.

Sections.Heading: Membership
Sections.Content: Membership in the Atria Health Institute is subject to separate membership agreements. The terms of membership, including fees, services, and obligations, are detailed in individual membership agreements provided upon enrollment.

Sections.Heading: Intellectual Property
Sections.Content: All content on this website, including text, graphics, logos, images, and software, is the property of Atria Health LLC and is protected by applicable intellectual property laws. You may not reproduce, distribute, or create derivative works without prior written consent.

Sections.Heading: Privacy
Sections.Content: Your use of our website is also governed by our Privacy Policy. Please review our Privacy Policy to understand our practices regarding the collection and use of your personal information.

Sections.Heading: Limitation of Liability
Sections.Content: Atria Health LLC shall not be liable for any indirect, incidental, special, consequential, or punitive damages arising out of your access to or use of the website or services.

Sections.Heading: Changes to Terms
Sections.Content: We reserve the right to modify these terms at any time. Changes will be effective immediately upon posting to the website. Your continued use of the website constitutes acceptance of the modified terms.

Sections.Heading: Contact
Sections.Content: If you have questions about these Terms & Conditions, please contact us at info@atria.org.
